g.text: fmap only: f :: a ⟶ Mb produces a nested M(Mb)
bind: fmap + flatten in one step — directly yields Mb

g.title: f :: a ⟶ Mb so fmap f :: Ma ⟶ M(Mb) — the wrapper is doubled
a separate flatten step is needed to collapse M(Mb) to Mb
bind = fmap f then flatten. Ma >>= f always returns a flat Mb.
f :: a ⟶ Mb so fmap f :: Ma ⟶ M(Mb) — the wrapper is doubled
a separate flatten step is needed to collapse M(Mb) to Mb
bind = fmap f then flatten. Ma >>= f always returns a flat Mb.
